tasks.label: kernel: qemu debug
tasks.command: pkill -f 'qemu-system-riscv64.*-kernel.*kernel.elf' >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; QEMU_BIN='/opt/qemu-bin-10.0.2/bin/qemu-system-riscv64'; if [ ! -x "$QEMU_BIN" ]; then QEMU_BIN="$(command -v qemu-system-riscv64)"; fi; if [ -z "$QEMU_BIN" ]; then echo 'qemu-system-riscv64 not found'; exit 1; fi; setsid "$QEMU_BIN" -machine virt -bios none -kernel "${workspaceFolder}/kernel.elf" -nographic -s -S </dev/null >"${workspaceFolder}/.qemu-debug.log" 2>&1 & echo $! >"${workspaceFolder}/.qemu-debug.pid"; for i in $(seq 1 100); do (echo >/dev/tcp/127.0.0.1/1234) >/dev/null 2>&1 && exit 0; sleep 0.1; done; echo 'QEMU gdbstub :1234 未就绪'; tail -n 80 "${workspaceFolder}/.qemu-debug.log"; exit 1

tasks.label: kernel: stop qemu
tasks.command: if [ -f "${workspaceFolder}/.qemu-debug.pid" ]; then kill $(cat "${workspaceFolder}/.qemu-debug.pid") >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; rm -f "${workspaceFolder}/.qemu-debug.pid"; fi; pkill -f 'qemu-system-riscv64.*-kernel.*kernel.elf' >/dev/null 2>&1 || true
